short.en: Two-piece stand with a friction hinge that holds 30°–80° viewing angles.
short.sl: Dvodelno stojalo s tornim zglobom, ki drži kote ogleda 30°–80°.

description.en: M5 nylon-insert lock-nut sets the friction; tightening adds resistance over time as PLA wears. Lip is wide enough for 11–13" tablets with a thin case. Folds flat for travel.
description.sl: M5 samovarovalna matica nastavi trenje; pritezanje pridoda upor, ko se PLA obrabi. Spodnji rob primeren za 11–13" tablice s tanko ovojnico. Zloži se ravno za potovanje.
